name: Resident Scheduling Cadence
description: Coordinate resident maintenance scheduling with guarded reminders, escalation thresholds, and internal-only handoff notes.

stages.name: Confirm Scheduling Context
stages.description: Collect the constraints needed before any scheduling outreach is prepared.

steps.title: Collect scheduling context
steps.instructions: Summarize access notes, urgency, trade, resident availability, vendor constraints, and any do-not-contact flags from the work-order record.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal scheduling context for maintenance coordination. Do not contact the resident.

steps.title: Review contact guardrails
steps.instructions: Confirm contact method, quiet hours, lockbox/access notes, and escalation owner before scheduling cadence starts.
steps.human_prompt: Review resident contact guardrails before scheduling outreach is released.

stages.name: Run Scheduling Cadence
stages.description: Prepare reminder attempts and route any blocked scheduling state for review.

steps.title: Draft initial scheduling message
steps.instructions: Draft the initial scheduling message with available windows, access requirements, and response options. Keep release gated to the approved outbound path.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft resident scheduling outreach for review; do not send externally.

steps.title: Stage follow-up cadence
steps.instructions: Stage follow-up attempts, response waiting periods, and escalation triggers for no-response or declined-window cases.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare internal follow-up schedule and escalation triggers; no outbound send.

stages.name: Confirm Schedule Resolution
stages.description: Document confirmed scheduling state or escalate the blocker.

steps.title: Confirm appointment details
steps.instructions: Verify final appointment window, access plan, vendor assignment, and resident-facing notes before the work order moves forward.
steps.human_prompt: Confirm final appointment details or mark the scheduling blocker for escalation.

steps.title: Record scheduling outcome
steps.instructions: Record the scheduling outcome, unresolved blockers, and next follow-up owner in the workflow audit trail.
steps.dispatch_body: Record scheduling outcome and next-owner notes.
